command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Me9dVE4fH3ZyTq.ed3df32c863d --database cTdrattvNQ95XCgX9zeyNM --execute 
-- Verificar unidade PACS Principal
SELECT id, name, financial_enabled FROM units WHERE name LIKE '%PACS%' OR name LIKE '%Principal%';

-- Verificar responsável ativo da PACS Principal
SELECT fru.*, fr.cpf_cnpj FROM financial_responsible_units fru
JOIN financial_responsibles fr ON fr.id = fru.financial_responsible_id
WHERE fru.ends_at IS NULL
ORDER BY fru.unit_id;

-- Verificar usuários vinculados a responsáveis financeiros
SELECT fru2.*, u.username, u.role FROM financial_responsible_users fru2
JOIN users u ON u.id = fru2.user_id;
messages: id	financial_responsible_id	unit_id	starts_at	ends_at	created_by	createdAt	cpf_cnpj
id	financial_responsible_id	user_id	createdAt	username	role
